message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Lucidiah. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Ancient Tiger into Void Basilisk.
I can evolve Void Basilisk into Storm Manticore.
I can evolve Infernal Wolf into Frozen Chimera.
I can evolve Frozen Chimera into Void Leviathan.
I can evolve Frozen Owlbear into Frozen Djinn.
I can evolve Frozen Djinn into Astral Chimera.
I can evolve Solar Djinn into Void Manticore.
I can evolve Void Manticore into Frozen Djinn.
I can evolve Arcane Hydra into Frozen Phoenix.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Wild Leviathan.
I can evolve Mystic Chimera into Crystal Wyvern.
I can evolve Crystal Wyvern into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Lunar Wyvern into Frozen Manticore.
I can evolve Frozen Manticore into Ancient Chimera.
I can evolve Wild Golem into Infernal Golem.
I can evolve Infernal Golem into Arcane Manticore.
I can evolve Thunder Phoenix into Storm Wyvern.
I can evolve Storm Wyvern into Infernal Drake.
I can evolve Storm Specter into Arcane Titan.
I can evolve Arcane Titan into Astral Manticore.
I can evolve Arcane Phoenix into Ancient Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Leviathan into Solar Serpent.

I can evolve Lunar Minotaur into Void Phoenix.
I can evolve Void Phoenix into Infernal Chimera.
I can evolve Solar Basilisk into Thunder Phoenix.
I can evolve Thunder Phoenix into Void Manticore.
I can evolve Celestial Chimera into Ancient Golem.
I can evolve Ancient Golem into Astral Specter.
I can evolve Celestial Drake into Thunder Griffin.
I can evolve Thunder Griffin into Celestial Leviathan.
I can evolve Lunar Leviathan into Solar Minotaur.
I can evolve Solar Minotaur into Frozen Titan.
I can evolve Celestial Tiger into Crystal Hydra.
I can evolve Crystal Hydra into Thunder Golem.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Thunder Phoenix.
I can evolve Thunder Phoenix into Ancient Kraken.
I can evolve Arcane Cyclops into Infernal Minotaur.
I can evolve Infernal Minotaur into Ancient Wolf.
I can evolve Frozen Minotaur into Astral Golem.
I can evolve Astral Golem into Void Wolf.
I can evolve Frozen Kraken into Lunar Owlbear.
I can evolve Lunar Owlbear into Ancient Wyvern.
I can evolve Solar Hydra into Ancient Wolf.
I can evolve Ancient Wolf into Celestial Manticore.
I can evolve Lunar Djinn into Lunar Manticore.
I can evolve Lunar Manticore into Mystic Manticore.
I can evolve Wild Chimera into Lunar Hydra.
I can evolve Lunar Hydra into Wild Titan.
I can evolve Infernal Chimera into Lunar Tiger.

I can evolve Celestial Drake into Celestial Kraken.
I can evolve Celestial Kraken into Ancient Drake.
I can evolve Ancient Specter into Shadow Basilisk.
I can evolve Shadow Basilisk into Solar Hydra.
Choose a beast evolution.
